summary: Clinical Assessment System Testing Complete - All 13 features tested and working. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified. Fixed minor bug in Assessment model (missing due_date and report_shared_with_client fields).

minor.issue: Assessment model was missing due_date and report_shared_with_client fields in response - FIXED

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 368-381: Added due_date and report_shared_with_client to Assessment model)
seed_data_creation: Multiple assessments created during testing (PHQ-9, GAD-7, DASS-21, WHO-5, HAM-A, BDI-II, AUDIT, RSES, ISI)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Assessment system fully tested. All 12 standard assessments available in library. Client-friendly names working (e.g., PHQ-9 = 'Mood Check-In'). Scoring with severity bands working for all assessment types including subscale scoring for DASS-21.

assessment_library_api.notes: GET /api/assessments/library returns all 12 assessments: PHQ-9, GAD-7, DASS-21, WHO-5, ASRS-v1.1, Y-BOCS, HAM-A, BDI-II, BPRS, ISI, AUDIT, RSES

therapist_assign_assessment.notes: POST /api/assessments - Therapist can assign assessment with optional due date

client_view_assigned_assessment.notes: GET /api/assessments/{id}/client-view - Returns client-friendly name (e.g., 'Worry & Anxiety Check-In' for GAD-7) and purpose

client_start_screen.notes: Start screen shows reassurance text 'There are no right or wrong answers'

one_question_per_screen.notes: Question screen shows one question at a time with progress indicator 'Question X of Y'

auto_save_progress.notes: POST /api/assessments/{id}/save-progress - Auto-save working, message shown 'Your progress is being saved automatically'

back_navigation.notes: Back button allows navigation to previous questions

thank_you_no_scores.notes: Confirmation screen shows 'Thank You' message without displaying scores to client

therapist_view_results.notes: GET /api/assessments/{id}/results - Therapist sees full scoring details including subscales for DASS-21

therapist_add_notes.notes: PUT /api/assessments/{id}/therapist-notes - Clinical notes can be added and saved

share_unshare_report.notes: POST /api/assessments/{id}/share-report and unshare-report - Sharing toggle works correctly

client_view_shared_report.notes: Client can only view results after therapist shares - returns 403 if not shared

scoring_verification.PHQ-9: Sum scoring with severity bands (Minimal/Mild/Moderate/Moderately Severe/Severe)
scoring_verification.DASS-21: Subscale scoring (Depression/Anxiety/Stress) with multiplier and individual severity bands
scoring_verification.WHO-5: Sum with multiplier (x4) for percentage score
scoring_verification.ASRS-v1.1: ADHD screener with Part A shaded threshold counting
